name: WritersProof for DocuSign
tagline: Attest who actually drafted the document before it goes out for signature
description: WritersProof for DocuSign extends the trust chain backward from signature to drafting. While DocuSign proves who signed a document, WritersProof proves who wrote it. As preparers compose and edit documents before sending them through DocuSign, WritersProof captures tamper-evident proof of the authoring process without storing document content — only SHA-256 hashes. Organizations in regulated industries can demonstrate that contracts, agreements, and compliance documents were genuinely human-authored, closing the gap between document preparation and execution.
features: Evidence capture during document preparation before envelope creation
Per-envelope attestation metadata linking drafting proof to signed documents
Template authorship attestation for reusable document templates
Audit trail integration correlating authorship evidence with DocuSign Certificate of Completion
Multi-preparer support with individual attestation per document contributor
Compliance dashboard showing attestation coverage across envelopes and templates
Connect webhook integration for automated attestation verification on send

requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
